scripts.dev: npm run build:scripts && tinacms dev -c "astro dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:scripts && npm run optimize:images && tinacms build --content=local -c "astro build" && node scripts/install-netlify-headers.mjs && node scripts/validate-site.mjs
scripts.build:local: npm run build:scripts && npm run optimize:images && tinacms build --local --skip-cloud-checks --skip-indexing -c "astro build" && node scripts/install-netlify-headers.mjs && node scripts/validate-site.mjs
scripts.audit:lighthouse: npm run build:local && npm run preview:static
